overview: WTOL is a territory-based fitness game where your GPS-tracked runs and workouts claim real map zones. Compete globally, build weekly training plans, chat with an AI fitness coach, and share your progress on the community feed.
features: Territory map showing owned zones by all runners
AI fitness coach chatbot for personalized training plans
Community feed to share workouts and follow other runners
Leaderboard with global and location filters
User profiles with fitness level and weekly availability
